weaknesses: Title not aligned to 'Senior' People/Data role
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, demonstrating experience with enterprise data governance standards.

Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, showcasing ability to translate business requirements into reporting solutions.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), eliminating repetitive data entry, saving 8 hours per week, and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, aligning with the need for operational efficiency through analytics and process improvement initiatives.

Cleaned and standardized dataset columns to ensure accuracy and support reliable analysis, demonstrating foundational data quality management principles, and designed an interactive Tableau dashboard to provide self-service access for stakeholders, visualizing arrests by location, time, and offense type.

Translated complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings to close the gap between raw data and growth strategy, demonstrating effective communication of complex data concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
JSR Tech Consulting

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Technical Data Analyst position at JSR Tech Consulting. With my background in data analysis, automation, and translating complex data into actionable insights, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

I am particularly drawn to JSR Tech Consulting's focus on driving impactful data solutions for clients and believe my proactive approach to data management and analysis aligns well with your company's commitment to innovation and efficiency.

In my previous roles, I have successfully developed and implemented automated reporting solutions that significantly improved efficiency and accuracy. Additionally, I have experience creating statistical models for customer segmentation and targeting marketing initiatives, which directly aligns with your need for analyzing and activating People-related data assets.

I understand the critical importance of robust data governance and quality in large-scale initiatives. In my role at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, establishing a "single source of truth" and reducing report discrepancies. I also have a strong foundation in SQL and Python for data analysis, and proficiency with data visualization tools such as Power BI and Tableau, all of which are key requirements for this role.

I am eager to leverage my skills in data quality, analytics, and stakeholder communication to support your People Domain Activation initiative. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
